name: blender
description: Use Blender MCP for controlled local scene edits with inspect-mutate-verify discipline.

companion.title: Finish setup inside Blender
companion.summary: Install the Blender Lab MCP add-on, start its local bridge, then sync Artyx.
steps: Get the Blender Lab MCP add-on from the official project page for your Blender version.
Enable the add-on in Blender Preferences, then start its bridge from the add-on panel.
Keep the bridge on 127.0.0.1:9876. Sync Blender in Artyx and confirm its four tools.
